name: spm-codex
description: Connect Codex to Structured Project Memory through the hosted SPM MCP endpoint.

interface.shortDescription: Project memory for Codex through SPM remote MCP.
interface.longDescription: SPM for Codex connects Codex to project-scoped temporal memory, context packs, context boundaries, graph query, preflight and post-action reports through the SPM remote MCP endpoint. The connector can authorize through a browser-approved SPM device flow, uses a project-scoped token from your SPM tenant and keeps billing, checkout and destructive admin tools outside the agent surface.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SPM as project memory for consequential Codex work. Query temporal state before important changes, request scoped context packs, run preflight when risk is material, and report completed work with tests and evidence.
